SOV Station — TESTNET build (sov-testnet-1)

⚠️  THIS IS A TEST NETWORK.
    • Coins (XUS) here have NO value and the chain may be reset at any time.
    • Do NOT use mainnet keys or real funds.

About this app:
    • SOV Station is a wallet AND a full node in one — the node runs IN-PROCESS,
      so closing the app stops the node (nothing is left mining in the background).
    • P2P peering is always on (it discovers other machines); it also mines solo
      with zero peers, so a single machine works fine.

macOS:  drag "SOV Station (Testnet).app" to Applications. It is unsigned, so the
        first launch needs right-click → Open (Gatekeeper).
Windows: unzip and run sov-station.exe. Unsigned, so SmartScreen may warn —
        More info → Run anyway.
